source.title: The hippocampal-VTA loop: controlling the entry of information into long-term memory

confidence_rationale: Foundational synthesis of the hippocampal mismatch -> VTA dopamine -> hippocampal LTP loop. Provides direct architectural support for MECH-287 dual-component broadcast trigger (anchor-side comparator coupled to LC/DA broadcast), and for the MECH-269 + MECH-285 dual-trace consolidation pathway via dopamine-driven encoding enhancement of newly-active anchors.
failure_signatures: Treating MECH-287 broadcast trigger and an anchor-side comparator as alternatives rather than coupled stages misses the loop architecture biology actually uses.
Subsequent work has complicated the precise pathway (LC-derived DA in CA1, ventral vs dorsal HC dissociation); the substrate should not commit to subiculum-NAc-VP-VTA as the unique substrate.

mapping.source_claim_statement: Hippocampus detects novel information via a comparator function and conveys it via subiculum-NAc-VP to VTA. VTA dopamine then feeds back to hippocampus to enhance LTP and the encoding of new information into long-term memory.
mapping.ree_translation: MECH-287 broadcast trigger has two coupled components: an anchor-side CA1/CA3 comparator-derived signal and the LC/global-DA broadcast documented in the waking-V_s lit-pull. These are coupled stages of the same trigger event, not alternatives. MECH-269 + MECH-285 dual-trace consolidation maps onto the dopamine-back-to-hippocampus loop: V_s drop -> broadcast -> enhanced encoding of newly-active anchor.
mapping.mapping_caveat: Subsequent work has refined and complicated the framework (LC-derived DA in CA1, ventral vs dorsal HC dissociation). Per-stream V_s extension is interpretive rather than directly tested.
mapping.source_context: Theoretical synthesis bridging hippocampal comparator function to VTA dopamine novelty signaling and back-projection to HC.

confidence_components.notes: Very high source quality. Mapping fidelity strong for the dual-component MECH-287 architecture. Transfer risk moderate due to subsequent complications of the precise pathway.
